{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Analyst (Entry-Level)",
  "description": "Laboria is a trusted provider of high-quality hospital and laboratory equipment, reagents, and consumables, delivering innovative IVD solutions at competitive prices with exceptional customer service. Committed to quality, service excellence, and innovation, we strive to be Nigeria&rsquo;s premier healthcare equipment partner while expanding our footprint to become a leading provider across Africa.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Analyst (Entry-Level)

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Capture and maintain accurate procurement data and records.
	Track purchase requests, purchase orders, deliveries, and procurement activities.
	Update and maintain procurement databases and spreadsheets.
	Analyze procurement data and prepare weekly and monthly reports.
	Monitor procurement performance metrics and identify trends.
	Ensure the accuracy and completeness of procurement records.
	Support the procurement team with data required for planning and decision-making.
	Assist in preparing procurement dashboards and management reports.
	Perform other administrative and analytical duties as assigned.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, Accounting, or any related field.
	0&ndash;2 years of experience in data entry, data gathering, reporting, administration, or a related analytical role (NYSC experience is acceptable).
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including formulas, Pivot Tables, and data organization.
	Strong analytical and numerical skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and a high level of accuracy.
	Good organizational and time management skills.
	Ability to work with large volumes of data while maintaining confidentiality.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to laboriahr@gmail.com using &quot;Procurement Analyst (Entry Level)&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Procurement Analyst (Entry-Level) Job at Laboria Limited




        
    

        
        Laboria is a trusted provider of high-quality hospital and laboratory equipment, reagents, and consumables, delivering innovative IVD solutions at competitive prices with exceptional customer service. Committed to quality, service excellence, and innovation, we strive to be Nigeria’s premier healthcare equipment partner while expanding our footprint to become a leading provider across Africa.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Analyst (Entry-Level)

Job Location: Ogba, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Capture and maintain accurate procurement data and records.
	Track purchase requests, purchase orders, deliveries, and procurement activities.
	Update and maintain procurement databases and spreadsheets.
	Analyze procurement data and prepare weekly and monthly reports.
	Monitor procurement performance metrics and identify trends.
	Ensure the accuracy and completeness of procurement records.
	Support the procurement team with data required for planning and decision-making.
	Assist in preparing procurement dashboards and management reports.
	Perform other administrative and analytical duties as assigned.


Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, Accounting, or any related field.
	0–2 years of experience in data entry, data gathering, reporting, administration, or a related analytical role (NYSC experience is acceptable).
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, including formulas, Pivot Tables, and data organization.
	Strong analytical and numerical skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and a high level of accuracy.
	Good organizational and time management skills.
	Ability to work with large volumes of data while maintaining confidentiality.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to [email protected] using "Procurement Analyst (Entry Level)" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Operations Manager Job at Ann’s Restaurant and Bar




        
    

        
        Ann’s Restaurant and Bar is a highly rated, trendy dining spot located in the upscale neighborhood of Maitama, Abuja. It is well-regarded for its beautiful, cozy ambiance, quick table service, and extensive menu options ranging from signature pastas to craft cocktails.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager

Job Locations: Maitama, Abuja

Requirements
     

            
    




	Interested candidates should possess a minimum of B.Sc. Degree with at least 2 years experience in the Hospitality industry
	Must be female.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Interview Venue:
No. 36 Gana Street,
Maitama, Abuja.

Note


	Interview Date and Time: 30th July 2026; 12:00 PM
	Come with a copy of your CV and Passport photograph.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Hoganguards Limited
content:
Hoganguards Limited has garnered experience spanning over two decades since its inception in 1981 by dealing with only reputable and well-organized companies and providing security surveillance for major oil companies, diplomatic missions, banks, and various industrial and residential concerns.

We are recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the following positions below:

1.) Payroll / Accounts Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	Process payroll accurately and ensure timely salary payments
	Maintain proper books of accounts, financial records, invoices, receipts, payment vouchers, and deployment expense records
	Prepare bank reconciliations, financial reports, and account summaries for management review
	Manage accounts payable and receivable, including client billing, contract payments, and vendor reconciliations
	Monitor company expenses and financial transactions
	Prepare and file statutory deductions and tax returns including VAT, PAYE, pension, and WHT
	Ensure compliance with company financial policies, accounting standards, and regulatory requirements
	Support audit processes and liaise with banks, auditors, clients, and regulatory agencies when required
	Maintain proper documentation and secure filing of accounting records
	Track attendance records, salary schedules, and field staff payment documentation


Requirements


	HND/B.Sc. in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in payroll and accounting functions, preferably in a security or service-based company
	Sound knowledge of accounting principles, taxation, payroll processing, and financial reporting
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	Strong attention to detail, accuracy, confidentiality, and record management
	Good communication, analytical, and organizational skills
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple payroll schedules effectively


Added Advantage:


	Professional accounting certification or training
	Experience with payroll management systems and large workforce administration
	Previous experience in the security industry or workforce management environment


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Executive Driver

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Safely transport the Company's Top Management to official meetings, appointments, and other assigned destinations.
	Plan, coordinate, and schedule travel routes to ensure timely arrival.
	Maintain the assigned vehicle(s) in a clean, presentable, and roadworthy condition at all times.
	Conduct routine vehicle inspections and promptly report any maintenance or repair requirements.
	Ensure the vehicle is adequately fueled and serviced in accordance with the maintenance schedule.
	Strictly comply with all traffic laws, road safety regulations, and company policies.
	Prioritize the safety, comfort, and confidentiality of passengers during all journeys.
	Communicate professionally, courteously, and respectfully with management, colleagues, and clients.
	Provide limited personal assistance or concierge support to management when required.
	Demonstrate flexibility to work weekends, extended hours, and undertake long-distance travel when necessary.
	Maintain an excellent driving record and uphold the highest standards of professionalism and discretion.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant Diploma, OND, or equivalent qualification.
	Must have 4–6 years of professional driving experience in Nigeria, with excellent knowledge of major road networks and routes.
	Valid Nigerian driver's licence with a clean driving record.
	Good communication skills, with the ability to speak, read, and understand English.
	Sound physical health and fitness, with the ability to undertake long-distance travel and work flexible hours.
	Ability to pass the Company's background verification and screening process.
	Impeccable personal appearance, excellent interpersonal skills, and a calm, courteous, and discreet disposition.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Office Cleaner

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Duties and Responsibilities


	Perform cleaning functions as required, including sweeping, dusting, vacuum-cleaning
	Clean surfaces, including floors, furniture, walls, doors, windows consistently.
	Keep office rooms, kitchen, and toilets clean and hygienic.
	Maintain and clean all cleaning equipment utilized.
	Empty and clean waste baskets; transporting waste material to designated collection points.
	Ensure that the office environment is clean.
	Always ensure cleanliness of facilities and report any instances of damage and mismanagement to the line supervisor.
	Ensure Health & Safety regulations are followed by all staff and visitors.


Education and Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a minimum of SSCE
	At least two (2) years of working experience
	Proficient in spoken English and any other Nigerian Languages.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Walexbiz Group, a dynamic conglomerate dedicated to pushing the boundaries of industry. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Full Stack Developer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled and motivated Full Stack Developer to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, testing, and maintaining web applications across both the front-end and back-end.
	You will work closely with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver scalable, secure, and user-friendly software solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain responsive web applications.
	Build intuitive user interfaces using modern front-end technologies.
	Optimize applications for speed, scalability, and security.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software issues.
	Develop and maintain server-side logic, APIs, and databases.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features.
	Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
	Conduct code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards.
	Integrate third-party services and APIs where required.
	Participate in software testing, deployment, and maintenance activities.
	Stay current with emerging technologies and recommend improvements.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Timely delivery of assigned development tasks.
	Code quality and adherence to best practices.
	System uptime and application performance.
	Bug resolution turnaround time.
	Successful deployment of new features.
	Team collaboration and contribution to technical improvements.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in full stack web development.
	Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and TypeScript.
	Experience with modern front-end frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js.
	Experience with back-end technologies such as Node.js, Python (Django/FastAPI), PHP (Laravel), Java (Spring Boot), or .NET.
	Strong knowledge of RESTful APIs and web services.
	Experience working with relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server) and/or NoSQL databases (MongoDB).
	Familiarity with Git and version control systems.
	Understanding of software development methodologies such as Agile/Scrum.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
	Knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.
	Experience with microservices architecture.
	Familiarity with automated testing frameworks.
	Knowledge of DevOps practices is an added advantage.


Technical Skills:


	HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript
	React, Angular, or Vue.js
	Node.js, Express.js, Laravel, Django, Spring Boot, or ASP.NET Core
	REST APIs and GraphQL
	MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
	Git/GitHub/GitLab
	Docker and CI/CD
	Linux server basics
	Cloud services (AWS, Azure, or GCP)


Soft Skills:


	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively.
	Strong attention to detail.
	Effective time management and organizational skills.
	Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary.
	Professional development and training opportunities.
	Collaborative and innovative work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, portfolio (if available), and links to GitHub or other relevant projects for consideration to: hrm@walexbizgroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Full Stack Developer Job at Walex Biz Group




        
    

        
        Walexbiz Group, a dynamic conglomerate dedicated to pushing the boundaries of industry. We are a reverence to the power of synergy and collaboration, with a diverse array of subsidiaries. Each of our subsidiaries is an example of industry greatness, driven by a shared dedication to innovation, integrity, and impact.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Full Stack Developer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a skilled and motivated Full Stack Developer to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, testing, and maintaining web applications across both the front-end and back-end.
	You will work closely with product managers, designers, and other developers to deliver scalable, secure, and user-friendly software solutions.


Key Responsibilities


	Design, develop, and maintain responsive web applications.
	Build intuitive user interfaces using modern front-end technologies.
	Optimize applications for speed, scalability, and security.
	Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software issues.
	Develop and maintain server-side logic, APIs, and databases.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features.
	Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
	Conduct code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards.
	Integrate third-party services and APIs where required.
	Participate in software testing, deployment, and maintenance activities.
	Stay current with emerging technologies and recommend improvements.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Timely delivery of assigned development tasks.
	Code quality and adherence to best practices.
	System uptime and application performance.
	Bug resolution turnaround time.
	Successful deployment of new features.
	Team collaboration and contribution to technical improvements.


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
	3–5 years of experience in full stack web development.
	Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and TypeScript.
	Experience with modern front-end frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js.
	Experience with back-end technologies such as Node.js, Python (Django/FastAPI), PHP (Laravel), Java (Spring Boot), or .NET.
	Strong knowledge of RESTful APIs and web services.
	Experience working with relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server) and/or NoSQL databases (MongoDB).
	Familiarity with Git and version control systems.
	Understanding of software development methodologies such as Agile/Scrum.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
	Knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines.
	Experience with microservices architecture.
	Familiarity with automated testing frameworks.
	Knowledge of DevOps practices is an added advantage.


Technical Skills:


	HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript
	React, Angular, or Vue.js
	Node.js, Express.js, Laravel, Django, Spring Boot, or ASP.NET Core
	REST APIs and GraphQL
	MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
	Git/GitHub/GitLab
	Docker and CI/CD
	Linux server basics
	Cloud services (AWS, Azure, or GCP)


Soft Skills:


	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and collaboratively.
	Strong attention to detail.
	Effective time management and organizational skills.
	Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary.
	Professional development and training opportunities.
	Collaborative and innovative work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, portfolio (if available), and links to GitHub or other relevant projects for consideration to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
